name: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk
summary: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, constructs and operates toll roads in Indonesia. It engages in implementing and providing consultancy services in the field of management, investment, information technology and telecommunications, transportation, project development, property management, and real estate; as well as sells product components of highway construction. The company operates the Simpang Susun Waru - Juanda toll road in Surabaya; Depok - Antasari toll road in Jakarta; Soreang - Pasir Koja toll road; Cileunyi - Sumedang - Dawuan Toll Road, and Sumedang Dawuan toll road. It also provides trading, development, procurement, contract, industry, land management, and other services. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in North Jakarta, Indonesia.
